{{CargoOrgan
|name=Demonic Ear
|type=Bionic
|rank=red
|id=10718
|idx=76
|description="It hears our words. It hears our movements. It hears our desperate heartbeats and the blood coursing through our veins. And It listens with a gluttonous hunger..."
— Demon King's Revelation
|skill=Before round start, envelop the body with fighting spirit, increasing DMG REDUC by 45% this round!
|hp=2250
|def=236
|atk=351
|rush=258
|gene1=Snail Arena, HP Regen +1600 per round
|gene2=In Snail Arena, HIT +12%
|gene3=Per 30 Star Coins redeemed, {race} HP +700
Star Coin Redeems: 90/90
|gene4=Snail Arena, Healing +24%
|gene5=Water RES +120
|gene6=Snail Arena, chance to paralyze enemy +4%
|gene7=Snail Arena, Healing +24% (Awakened)
|}}
